query: List the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending.

1.description: get Finnmark fylke geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities with geometry and numbers

4.description: get buildings filtered to Finnmark municipalities (by kommunenummer list from step 3)

6.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood zones

8.description: attach municipality names to counts from step 7 using kommunenummer

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE lower(fylkesnavn) ILIKE '%finnmark%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer IN ('5601','5602','5603','5604','5605','5606','5607','5608','5609','5610','5611','5612','5613','5614','5615','5616','5617','5618','5619','5620','5621','5622');

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid AS id, flomsoneid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 5
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"
